info.title: Retrieve Warranty Information API
info.description:
Retrieves **detailed warranty coverage and history** for a specified **PIN** (product identification number), keyed by **dealer number** and **PIN**. The legacy SOAP **Retrieve Warranty Information** operation maps to this REST API; see your SOAP-to-REST field mapping and REST API FAQ for property-level details.

Support: Warranty_Api_Support@JohnDeere.com

servers.description: Sandbox (cert). Production uses `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` — confirm the path prefix under `/digcust/wy/` and whether the `cert` segment is present for your environment.

OAuth2.description: John Deere Dealer Solutions OAuth 2.0. Use the **authorization code** flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the **client credentials** grant for machine-to-machine access. Request the OAuth scope assigned to your application for this API (this reference uses `warranty` as an example — confirm the scope in your Developer.Deere.com application and technical documentation).

WtyInfo.description: Warranty information entity returned from **WtyInfoSet**. The exact properties depend on the OData contract and your SOAP-to-REST mapping; additional fields may appear.

dealerNum.description: Dealer number used in the lookup key.

pin.description: Product identification number (PIN) used in the lookup key.

coverageStatus.description: High-level warranty coverage status when returned by the service.

message.example: No warranty information was found for the supplied dealer number and PIN.

get.summary: Get warranty information by dealer number and PIN
get.description:
Retrieves **WtyInfo** entities from **WtyInfoSet** using the OData-style key: **DealerNum** and **Pin**.

**Sandbox example:** `GET https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/DbsWtyInfo/WtyInfoSet(DealerNum='550012345',Pin='1E012345678901')`

**Production:** Use the production host (`https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com`) with the path pattern documented for your program (the `cert` segment or application id may differ from sandbox).

**Accept:** `application/json`

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (sandbox example: `DbsWtyInfo`).

parameters.name: DealerNum
parameters.description: Dealer number in the WtyInfoSet key.

parameters.name: Pin
parameters.description: Product identification number (PIN) in the WtyInfoSet key.

200.description: Warranty coverage and history returned for the supplied key.

400.description: Bad request — malformed key or invalid parameters.

error.message: The WtyInfoSet key could not be parsed.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.

404.description: No warranty information found for the supplied dealer number and PIN.

error.message: No warranty information was found for the supplied key.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
